data.title: Bitget launches the second Early Hunter Airdrop, this airdrop project is Tutorial (TUT)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget launched the second Early Hunter Airdrop, this airdrop project is Tutorial (TUT). Users only need to hold at least 10 BGB in Bitget spot, leverage and financial accounts to participate in the Early Hunter airdrop plan. The airdrop plan is as follows:
Sunshine Award:
The first 1,000 users who complete TUT spot transactions before 02:00 (UTC+8) on March 28 will receive a TUT token airdrop equivalent to US$10. The price of TUT awards will be based on the closing price of the day before the award.
Surprise Grand Prize:
Users who complete TUT spot transactions before 18:00 (UTC+8) on March 31 and hold at least 10 BGB will automatically enter the lottery pool. Bitget will conduct a live lottery on the Bitget official X platform at 22:00 (UTC+8) on March 31, with the first prize being 1,000 BGB and the second prize being 100 BGB.
Bitget Early Hunter Airdrop aims to reward early traders of high-quality projects, and will cooperate with high-potential projects from time to time to issue token airdrop rewards.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETFs Experience Significant Net Outflows
data.description:
According to PANews, data from SoSoValue indicates that on March 27 (Eastern Time), Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $4.2159 million. All nine ETFs reported no net inflows. Notably, the VanEck ETF (ETHV) experienced a single-day net outflow of $2.207 million, with a historical total net inflow of $136 million. Meanwhile, the Fidelity ETF (FETH) recorded a single-day net outflow of $2.0088 million, with a historical total net inflow of $1.408 billion.

As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs stands at $6.871 billion, representing 2.84% of Ethereum's total market capitalization. The historical cumulative net inflow for these ETFs is $2.404 billion.

data.title: CZ responds to Abu Dhabi MGX's $2 billion investment in Binance: No gambling clauses and strategic considerations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: CZ responded to the "Abu Dhabi MGX $2 billion investment in Binance" on the X platform and said, "There is no gambling clause and no strategy (at least from my personal perspective)."

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $4.2159 million yesterday, and none of the nine ETFs had a net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (March 27, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was 4.2159 million US dollars.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was VanEck ETF ETHV, with a single-day net outflow of 2.207 million US dollars. Currently, ETHV has a total net inflow of 136 million US dollars.
The second is Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net outflow of 2.0088 million US dollars. Currently, FETH has a total net inflow of 1.408 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 6.871 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.84%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 2.404 billion US dollars.

data.title: Three addresses deposited 22.15 million mubarak to Binance, and the profit from selling will be 2.34 million US dollars
Morph Black NFT's floor price on OpenSea rises to 1 ETH, with a 24-hour increase of 500% and a 1-hour trading volume ranking among the top three
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OpenSea data shows that the floor price of Morph Black NFT launched by the consumer-grade public chain Morph has risen to 1 ETH, with a 24-hour increase of 500%, and the 1-hour trading volume surpassed BAYC to rank in the top three. Morph Black NFT began to be minted at 20:00 on March 27, with a single minting price of 0.2ETH, limited to 3,000 pieces, and more than 2,700 pieces have been minted so far.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net inflow of $89.0638 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 10 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (March 27, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was 89.0638 million US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of 97.1373 million US dollars. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached 11.563 billion US dollars.
The second is BlackRock Bitcoin ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of 3.9675 million US dollars. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached 39.946 billion US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Invesco and Galaxy Digital's ETF BTCO, with a single-day net outflow of 6.9519 million US dollars. Currently, BTCO's total net inflow has reached 98.1845 million US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$98.288 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 5.67%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$36.338 billion.

data.title: Canary CEO refutes the launch of altcoin ETF as disguised advertising: early bets can gain first-mover advantage, and some applications are expected to be approved next year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Canary Capital has submitted multiple altcoin ETF applications intensively. The community believes that this practice may be a gimmick and marketing method. In response, the fund's CEO Steven McClurg refuted that all applications are well-thought-out and early bets hope to gain first-mover advantage. For example, HBAR is a relatively stable token, and market demand has not yet attracted the attention of other ETF issuers. The application for PENGU ETF is because the US Securities and Exchange Commission officials publicly stated that NFT and Meme coins should not be classified as securities. Steven McClurg added: "If it is a large company like BlackRock, it can take risks, but small companies like Canary Capital must be very cautious with time and money. I think many ETF proposals may be approved next year." (Cryptoslate)

data.title: Binance Adds MUBARAK and Other Cryptocurrencies to Simple Earn and Multi-Trade Services
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance has launched flexible financial products for MUBARAK, BROCCOLI714, TUT and BANANAS31 on SimpleEarn at 02:00 (UTC) on March 28, 2025. Users can purchase the above tokens through the "Buy Coins" page at 05:00 (UTC) on March 28, 2025, using their account balance or credit card, and trade the relevant currency pairs at BinanceConvert with zero transaction fees. In addition, Binance margin trading will add MUBARAK, TUT and BANANAS31 as loanable assets and corresponding trading pairs at 04:30 (UTC) on March 28, 2025. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Gate.io launches GHIBLI perpetual contract, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch GHIBLI perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 12:00 (UTC+8) on March 28, supporting 1-50 times leverage.
